title: Chuii's World
description: A modpack made by DevilShark which focuses on expanding the minecraft experience through both the atmosphere and general gameplay experience. From terrifying caves to beautiful mountains that will take your breath away.
body: A horror modpack made by DevilShork for his minecraft server. The modpack is based around making minecraft have a spookier atmopshere while staying relatively vanilla plus with some flavor added in such as having to find the castle to fight the enderdragon as the stronghold has been removed entirely.
